description: Sparse-cube re-run of EXP-2400 combined stack, with EXP-2420 cost drag applied to derive the definitive honest net numbers

data_sources.cost_model: compass.exp2420_transaction_costs.net_sharpe_from_drag with annual_drag_pct=22.205 (EXP-2420 net_metrics.drag_pct, derived from real IronVault bid-ask proxies + real Yahoo ADV)
